backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the fget backend, wiring together blob storage, access control, user approval, file/folder metadata management, and canister configuration with version 0.4.109.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: button background color fixes in FileList.tsx and an APP_VERSION bump to 0.4.151 in appVersion.ts.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of concise per-file summaries for all frontend source files, describing each component's purpose and key behaviors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the React frontend, mounting the app into a root div and loading main.tsx as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component handling Internet Identity auth, access bootstrapping, profile setup flow, pending-approval screen, folder navigation state, and conditional rendering of the main file management UI.
frontend/src/components/AccessDenied.tsx: Pending-approval screen shown to authenticated users without access, displaying a clock icon, their copyable shortened Principal ID, and instructions to contact an admin.
frontend/src/components/FileGallery.tsx: Gallery-view component rendering file system items in a responsive grid with checkboxes, hover action dropdowns, image/video previews, and search-result path display.
frontend/src/components/FileList.tsx: Main file manager component that renders a browsable, searchable file/folder tree with support for upload, download, delete, move, create folder, drag-and-drop, sorting, list/grid view modes, and file preview.
frontend/src/components/FileListHeaderRo: Renders the table header row for the file list, including a select-all checkbox and sortable column buttons for Name, Type, Created, Size, and an optional Location column.
frontend/src/components/FilePreviewModal: Modal dialog that previews a selected file (image, video, audio, document, or text) with navigation between files, fullscreen/maximize support, and download action.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders a sticky footer displaying the app copyright year, version number, and a branded link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar showing the app logo, authenticated user's name and principal ID (with copy), admin manage panel access, theme toggle, and login/logout button.
frontend/src/components/ManagePanel.tsx: Admin settings dialog for managing members (add/remove with role selection), viewing storage stats, and displaying app version and system info.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Onboarding form that lets a newly authenticated user pick a unique username, with debounced uniqueness checking and backend validation error handling.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: A button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes, displaying Sun/Moon icons with CSS transitions.
frontend/src/components/ZoomPanViewer.ts: A wrapper component that enables mouse-drag panning and scroll-wheel zooming (0.5x–5x) for its children, resetting transform when children change.
frontend/src/hooks/useAccessBootstrap.ts: A hook that calls `initializeAccessControl()` once per authenticated session (tracked via sessionStorage) and then invalidates/refetches access-related React Query caches.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and identity persistence across page reloads.
An in-memory hook that stores and retrieves per-folder view modes ('list' or 'gallery'), defaulting to 'list' for any folder.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user roles, approval status, file/folder CRUD, search, and admin operations, gating queries on actor availability and access rights.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining light and dark theme CSS custom properties (OKLCH color tokens) for the design system, plus a breadcrumb link utility class.
frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts: Exports a single constant `APP_VERSION` string representing the current application version.
frontend/src/lib/canisterIds.ts: Utility that resolves backend and frontend ICP canister IDs by checking multiple sources in priority order: Vite env vars, window globals, URL params, hostname, and process.env.
frontend/src/lib/dragDropDirectory.ts: Provides utilities to extract files from drag-and-drop events, recursively traversing directories using the FileSystem API and falling back to standard file drops when unavailable.
frontend/src/lib/fileLinks.ts: Provides helpers to get a file's direct download URL, copy it to the clipboard, and download a file with its original filename using a blob URL approach.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypes.ts: Provides utilities for file extension extraction, MIME type lookup, previewability checks, category detection (image, video, audio, etc.), and human-readable type labels.
frontend/src/lib/fileTypeTints.ts: Maps file categories, folders, and unknown types to Tailwind CSS tint class strings for consistent light/dark theme badge styling.
frontend/src/lib/folderNavigation.ts: Provides helpers for building breadcrumb paths, resolving path segments to folder IDs, and computing full path strings for files and folders within a flat folder list.
frontend/src/lib/folderUpload.ts: Handles recursive folder uploads by extracting folder/file structure, creating all required folders in depth order, then uploading non-empty files with progress callbacks.
frontend/src/lib/formatFileSize.ts: Converts a byte count (number or bigint) to a human-readable string using base-1024 units (B, KB, MB, GB, TB).
frontend/src/lib/formatTime.ts: Converts backend bigint nanosecond timestamps to formatted English date/time strings in full, date-only, and compact 24-hour variants.
frontend/src/lib/id.ts: Exports a single function that generates a cryptographically secure 32-byte random ID as a hex string for use as file and folder upload IDs.
frontend/src/lib/searchNormalize.ts: Provides Unicode-aware, case-insensitive, diacritics-insensitive text normalization and substring matching utilities for search functionality.
frontend/src/lib/sortFileSystemItems.ts: Provides a deterministic sorting function for FileSystemItem arrays supporting fields like name, size, type, created, and updated, with stable tie-breakers by kind, name, and id.
frontend/src/lib/subtreeIndex.ts: Builds a set of folder IDs representing a subtree starting from a given folder, using a parent-to-children index over all folders.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state including existing features (button styling fixes and version bump to 0.4.151) and architectural notes for a file manager app.
